name: Only Way is Down
short_description: Embark on a purrfectly perilous rage filled adventure as this lil kitty cat took an unfortunate catnap and ended up stranded sky high! With no way but down, master your feline agility and platforming prowess to navigate your descent through the urban jungle in this gravity defying escapade!
detailed_description:
Embark on a risky rage filled adventure in the Only Way is Down a challenging 3D platforming game that puts you in the paws of a kitty cat with an unexpected journey home. You take control of a feline explorer who, after an accidental catnap on some construction materials, finds themselves at the top of a towering skyscraper under construction. Now, it's up to you to find your way through a maze of precarious platforms, daring leaps, and navigate nerve shattering pathways to make your way back down to the cozy comforts of home.

🐾 Watch Your Step: Master your feline reflexes in this intense, rage filled adventure. Precision and skill are your best allies; place two or more paws over the edge, and you'll lose your balance sending kitty tumbling down to the ground.



🚧 Purr-fectly Crafted Cityscape: Explore a vertical playground in the heart of a bustling metropolis. From steel beams and scaffolding to cranes and half-finished floors, each area presents a unique challenge that will test your platforming prowess.



🎩 Customise Kitty: Give your kitty their own unique style with a wide range of kitty options and clothes! Pick your cat type, eye colour and chonkiness and unlock and mix-and-match customisable hats, glasses, masks, and other accessories to create a look that’s all your own.



🏗️ Kitty Cat World: Use the construction site elements to your advantage like only a lil kitty cat can. Climb on beams, leap over dangerous drops, swing on cranes, and navigate through the ever-evolving landscape.



😺 Feline Agility: Take control of this lost lil kitty cat and use their agile movement and feline reflexes to gracefully navigate through tight spaces, make daring jumps and gracefully land on narrow surfaces. It's all about finesse and precision!



🏙️ Dazzling Skyline: Immerse yourself in a vibrant and seemingly endless cityscape as you descend. Watch the city blend into the horizon and marvel at the stunning views that unfold as you make your way down the towering skyscrapers.



Set out on a paw-some escapade with this lil kitty cat and experience the thrill of descending skyscrapers in this feline-filled adventure. Only Way is Down is not just a game; it's a formidable journey that will leave you purring for more! Are you ready to take the plunge and find your way back home.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Indonesian, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Portuguese - Brazil, Arabic, Bulgarian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Finnish, Greek, Hungarian, Norwegian, Romanian, Swedish, Traditional Chinese, Serbian
